## Summary

Briefly describe your change.

## Type of change

- [ ] Add resource(s)
- [ ] Fix broken / incorrect link(s)
- [ ] Documentation / structure improvement
- [ ] CI or repository health

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the [link policy](../CONTRIBUTING.md#link-policy)
- [ ] Links verified in a browser (or clearly documented if inaccessible from CI)
- [ ] Correct language file and skill-level section
- [ ] No duplicate titles on the same page
- [ ] Markdown formatting is valid

## Notes

Optional context for reviewers.
